sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 5.14 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.5)

statement.latex: An intersection of some Sylow 2-sub\-groups is called a Sylow intersection\/ and an intersection of a pair of Sylow 2-sub\-groups is called a paired Sylow intersection. [r]{a)} Describe the finite groups all of whose 2-local subgroups have odd indices. [r]{b)} Describe the finite groups all of whose normalizers of Sylow intersections have odd indices.
